name: billing clerks at medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For billing clerks at medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.

problem_solved: Inaccurate reconciliation of patient billing against insurance payments.
features: manual entry of patient billing data
